recommendations.title: Rowdy Rathore
recommendations.overview: A small-time thug comes across a young girl who claims him to be her father, following which he realizes he has a lookalike who's being hunted by goons.

recommendations.title: Be With You
recommendations.overview: Along with his young son, Ji-ho, Woo-jin misses his wife Soo-a, who died after promising to return a year later with the rainy season. Miraculously, they reunite with Soo-a when the rainy season comes around, but she has no memory of her husband and

recommendations.title: Hwayi: A Monster Boy
recommendations.overview: After being kidnapped as a small child and raised by the five men who abducted him, a teenage boy is now forced to join their life in crime.

recommendations.title: The Terror Live
recommendations.overview: A newsman discovers he's been rigged with a bomb after he has an exclusive interview with a terrorist who blew up a bridge.

recommendations.title: The Beauty Inside
recommendations.overview: Woo-jin, a furniture designer who wakes up in a different body every day, falls for Yi-soo, a woman he meets through his work.

recommendations.title: The Dude in Me
recommendations.overview: Dong-hyun is a high school student. One day, he falls from the rooftop and bumps into Pan-soo who is a passerby. Pan-soo is a member of a criminal organization. When the two men wake up in the hospital, they discover that they have switched bodies.

recommendations.title: Tune in for Love
recommendations.overview: During the 1990s, hardworking Mi-soo and optimistic Hyun-woo meet at a bakery and fall in love while exchanging stories on a radio station, but while their paths keep crossing, the timing never seems to work out.

recommendations.title: The Chaser
recommendations.overview: Joong-ho is a dirty detective turned pimp, who's in financial trouble as several of his girls have recently disappeared without clearing their debts. While trying to track them down, he finds a clue that the vanished girls were all called up by the s

recommendations.title: Asura: The City of Madness
recommendations.overview: A shady cop finds himself in over his head when he gets caught between Internal Affairs and the city’s corrupt mayor.

recommendations.title: Parasite
recommendations.overview: All unemployed, Ki-taek's family takes peculiar interest in the wealthy and glamorous Parks for their livelihood until they get entangled in an unexpected incident.
